seo.title: Fer’s Alignment & Brakes | Expert Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Top-rated auto mechanic in Dallas, TX specializing in alignments, brakes, and mufflers. Honest service, fair prices, and expert work since 1995. Call (214) 821-5445.

hero.headline: Dallas’ Go-To Auto Mechanic for Alignments, Brakes & Mufflers
hero.subheadline: Keep your car running safely and smoothly with expert service from a team you can trust. We treat every vehicle like our own.

featureSections.title: Extend Tire Life & Improve Handling
featureSections.body: Proper wheel alignment keeps your car driving straight, reduces tire wear, and improves fuel efficiency. Our state-of-the-art equipment ensures your vehicle meets manufacturer specs every time.
bullets: Saves money on premature tire replacement
featureSections.cardBody: Get a one-time alignment and enjoy free checks for as long as you own your vehicle.

featureSections.title: Safe Stops & Quiet Rides
featureSections.body: Your brakes and exhaust system are critical for safety and comfort. We inspect, repair, and replace brake pads, rotors, mufflers, and catalytic converters with quality parts and expert workmanship.
bullets: Free brake inspection with any service
featureSections.cardBody: Bring your car in for a complimentary brake check – no appointment needed.

whyChooseUs.title: Experienced Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our ASE-certified mechanics have decades of combined experience working on all makes and models.

whyChooseUs.title: Honest & Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: We provide upfront estimates with no hidden fees – you approve all work before we start.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: Most services are completed the same day so you can get back on the road quickly.

whyChooseUs.title: Warranty on All Repairs
whyChooseUs.description: We stand behind our work with a comprehensive warranty for your peace of mind.

testimonials.quote: I’ve been bringing my cars here for years. They always explain what’s needed and the prices are fair. Highly recommend!

testimonials.quote: Fast, friendly, and reliable. They fixed my brake issue in under two hours – and it was much cheaper than the dealer quoted.
testimonials.author: Lisa T.

testimonials.quote: Honest mechanics are hard to find. Fer’s is the real deal – they’ve saved me money and kept my truck running perfectly.

cta.headline: Ready to Experience the Fer’s Difference?
cta.subheadline: Call us or stop by today – we’ll take care of your car like it’s our own.

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to major repairs, Fer’s Alignment & Brakes offers a full range of auto services to keep your vehicle safe and reliable. Our experienced technicians use top-quality parts and the latest diagnostic tools to get the job done right.

services.title: Wheel Alignment
services.shortDescription: Extend tire life and improve handling with precision computerized alignment.
services.longDescription: Proper wheel alignment is crucial for safe driving and tire longevity. Our advanced alignment system measures angles to manufacturer specifications, correcting camber, caster, and toe. We service all passenger cars, SUVs, and light trucks.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check tire condition, suspension components, and current alignment angles.

process.title: Adjustment
process.description: Using computerized equipment, we adjust alignment to your vehicle’s exact specifications.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We take your car for a road test to ensure everything feels right.

faqs.question: How often should I get an alignment?
faqs.answer: Most manufacturers recommend every 6,000 miles or if you notice pulling, uneven tire wear, or after hitting a large pothole.

faqs.question: How long does an alignment take?
faqs.answer: Typically 30 to 60 minutes depending on your vehicle.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Restore stopping power with brake pad, rotor, and caliper services.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle’s most important safety feature. We provide complete brake inspections, pad replacement, rotor resurfacing or replacement, and caliper service. We use premium parts to ensure quiet, reliable stopping.
benefits: Peace of mind on the road

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: We measure pad thickness, rotor condition, and fluid levels.

process.title: Service & Replacement
process.description: We replace worn pads, resurface or replace rotors, and lubricate calipers.

process.title: Final Test
process.description: We test the brakes on the road to ensure optimal performance.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need new brakes?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking, grinding, a soft brake pedal, or vibration when braking.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty on brake work?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our brake services with a parts and labor warranty.

services.title: Muffler & Exhaust System
services.shortDescription: Quiet your ride and pass emissions with exhaust repairs and replacements.
services.longDescription: A damaged exhaust system can cause loud noise, reduced fuel efficiency, and failed emissions tests. We repair or replace mufflers, catalytic converters, pipes, and oxygen sensors. We also offer custom exhaust work for those seeking a performance sound.

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check for leaks, rust, and damage from the manifold to the tailpipe.

process.title: Repair or Replacement
process.description: We replace faulty components with quality parts, including OEM or aftermarket options.

process.title: Emissions Check
process.description: We verify the system is leak-free and ready for your next emissions test.

faqs.question: Why is my car so loud?
faqs.answer: A hole or rust in the muffler or exhaust pipe is usually the cause. We can pinpoint and fix it quickly.

faqs.question: Do you install performance exhaust systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer custom exhaust installations for improved sound and performance.

services.title: General Auto Repair & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your car running smoothly with oil changes, belts, hoses, and more.
services.longDescription: Beyond alignments, brakes, and exhaust, we handle a wide range of maintenance and repair services including oil changes, battery replacement, serpentine belts, hoses, and suspension work. We’re your one-stop shop for keeping your vehicle in top shape.

process.title: Comprehensive Check
process.description: We inspect key systems and listen to your concerns.

process.title: Service & Repairs
process.description: We perform the required maintenance or repairs using quality parts.

process.title: Final Quality Check
process.description: We verify everything is working properly before returning your car.

faqs.question: Do you perform routine oil changes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer conventional and synthetic oil changes along with a multi-point inspection.

faqs.question: Can you diagnose check engine lights?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We use advanced diagnostic tools to read codes and identify the issue.

about.headline: Family-Owned Auto Care in Dallas Since 1995
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair at fair prices, treating every customer like a neighbor and every car like our own.
story: Fer’s Alignment & Brakes was founded in 1995 by Fernando “Fer” Martinez, a master mechanic with a passion for precision and a commitment to integrity. Starting as a small two-bay shop on Carroll Avenue, Fer built a loyal following by doing the job right the first time and never upselling unnecessary work. Over the years, the shop grew as word spread about Fer’s honest pricing and expert craftsmanship.

Today, Fer’s is still family-owned and operated, serving drivers from Lakewood to Deep Ellum and beyond. Our team of ASE-certified technicians continues Fer’s legacy of transparency, quality, and community. Whether it’s a simple alignment or a complex brake job, we treat every vehicle with the same care we’d give our own.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs – and what it doesn’t.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow manufacturer specifications for every repair.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We’re proud to be a locally owned business that supports our Dallas neighbors.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We stand behind our work with warranties and on-time service.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Fer’s Alignment & Brakes
contact.subheadline: Call us, stop by, or schedule online – we’re here to help with all your auto care needs.
